title: [FIRRTL] Define `getAsKey/getKey`  in storage classes
body:
Storage classes have to implement `getKey/getAsKey` (even though currently it's optional, and only used by `SubElementInterface.h`) so it would be nice to implement them for manually implemented FIRRTL type storages. Also this is useful for extending type alias to non-base types (inherit storage classes etc.). 

https://mlir.llvm.org/docs/DefiningDialects/AttributesAndTypes/#defining-a-storage-class 

```
* Provide a method to generate the KeyTy from a list of arguments passed to the uniquer when building an Attribute or Type. (Note: This is only necessary if the KeyTy cannot be default constructed from these arguments).
static KeyTy getKey(Args...&& args)

* Provide a method to generate the KeyTy from an instance of the storage class.
static KeyTy getAsKey()
```

https://reviews.llvm.org/D155043 needs to be merged beforehand since several FIRRTL storage classes use pairs as underlining data structure.
